title: filter_presence field comment doesn't document Unknown rejection
description: The field comment says 'Filter to contacts with this exact presence state.' — it doesn't mention that passing Some(OwnerPresence::Unknown) returns InvalidArgument at runtime. Add: 'Passing Some(OwnerPresence::Unknown) is rejected — Unknown is a deserialization catch-all and has no meaning as a filter.'
close_reason: Fixed: filter_presence doc now explains Unknown rejection explicitly.
